title: Restore trudoc verify via Node in CI

source.subject: fix(ci): restore trudoc verify via Node, build runtime bridge for e2e

body:
## What shipped

CI runs trudoc verification under Node (not Bun stub) and builds the runtime bridge required by dependent e2e steps.

## Source commit

Repository **`beskid`** · commit `0a173a6`

> fix(ci): restore trudoc verify via Node, build runtime bridge for e2e

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
